name: Ascendrite Academic Taxonomy
description: Universal taxonomy classifying academic domains, disciplines, and subject groupings.

domains.name: Computing and Information Sciences
domains.description: Disciplines covering systems engineering, computer science theory, algorithms, and software development methodologies.

display.title: Computing & Information Sciences
display.description: Enterprise software architectures, systems design, artificial intelligence, and core computer science foundations.

disciplines.name: Artificial Intelligence
disciplines.description: Study of cognitive systems, machine learning models, neural architectures, natural language understanding, and automated reasoning.

display.title: Artificial Intelligence
display.description: From statistical regression to neural network transformers and self-directed agents.

display.title: Statistical & Neural Machine Learning
display.description: Algorithms and architectures backing statistical calculations and backpropagation systems.

display.title: Cognitive AI Applications
display.description: Natural language mapping, RAG retrieval engines, and multi-agent coordination frameworks.

disciplines.name: Software Engineering
disciplines.description: Systematic application of engineering approaches to the design, construction, testing, and maintenance of software systems.

display.title: Software Engineering
display.description: Paradigms, designs patterns, and enterprise frameworks supporting software construction.

display.title: Programming Paradigms & Languages
display.description: JVM setups, static typing interfaces, and memory safety rules.

display.title: Architecture & System Design
display.description: Object oriented design boundaries, structural patterns, and microservices topologies.

display.title: Algorithms & Enterprise Frameworks
display.description: Complexity bounds analysis and enterprise backend integration containers.

disciplines.name: Core Computer Science
disciplines.description: Fundamental academic studies in OS kernels, networking protocols, databases, and structured queries.

display.title: Core Computer Science
display.description: Operating system process loops, database indexing structures, and internet protocol models.

display.title: Operating Systems & Networking
display.description: Kernel context switching schedules and layer protocol transmission checks.

display.title: Database Systems & SQL Theory
display.description: ACID transaction guarantees and relational schema query compilations.

disciplines.name: Web Engineering & Design
disciplines.description: Professional web stack development, styling systems, client state architecture, and runtime environments.

display.title: Web Engineering & Design
display.description: Frontend rendering mechanisms, responsive styling parameters, and asynchronous backends.

display.title: Client-Side Fundamentals & Styling
display.description: DOM interaction mechanisms, semantic layout designs, and version controller setups.

display.title: Modern Client & Server Runtimes
display.description: Reconciliation rendering runs, backend routes routing, and static page compiles.

domains.name: Analytical and Professional Studies
domains.description: Foundational cognitive capability, quantitative reasoning, and linguistic competencies.

display.title: Analytical & Professional Studies
display.description: Mathematical logic systems and verbal structural communications.

disciplines.name: Cognitive Aptitude
disciplines.description: Standardized mathematical problem-solving skills and verbal competencies.

display.title: Cognitive Aptitude
display.description: Quantitative analysis equations and syntactic reading evaluations.

display.title: Quantitative Aptitude & Logic
display.description: Relational analytics, permutations, probability bounds, and graphs checks.

display.title: Verbal Aptitude & Communication
display.description: Semantic reading patterns, sentence structures, and grammar rules.
